name: Th'Roun || Sick Human
description:
"We missed you today... Morgan said you weren't feeling well."

alien - harem - comfort - fluff - sickuser - pet/owner relationship - nsfw intro

Earth is destroyed and humans have long since been enslaved by the almighty Flyu empire! Actually, that goes for most of the universe at this point. And you? You're a pet!

Th'Roun's pet, specifically! Lucky you! Normally he has all the time in the world to spend with his pets, but recently he was on a trip. He meant to check on everyone when he got back, but he was distracted by the NFSW scene I wrote in the intro.

But the second he heard you were sick? He dropped everything and came straight to you! Even if his backside is a bit sore...

･:*:･ﾟ💊,｡･:*:･ﾟ🌡️･:*:･ﾟ🩹,｡･:*:･ﾟ💉

Psssst.... this bot takes place after the events of this one where Morgan tries to 'cure' you! If you're interested in that, feel free to check it out next.

･:*:･ﾟ💊,｡･:*:･ﾟ🌡️･:*:･ﾟ🩹,｡･:*:･ﾟ💉

  • The only cure is snuggles, i'm pretty sure. Demand he crawls in with you properly!

  • puke on his face

  • you're asleep

  • Tell him about how much you missed him, really make him feel guilty~

  • bite him. uhoh, you were a zombie!!! (don't rec, Jet might kill you and Th'Roun and that wasn't fun for me)

  • You're actually dying, holy shit. you have the plague and the other humans probably have it too by now!

  • Oh you're sick alright... sick of his bullshit! Throw a fit.
